description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma sandals are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. Upper Synthetic upper with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle with adjustable velcro closures Padded straps on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug Fit Logo embroidered on the ankle and the forefoot strap Midsole Cushioned suede footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot and heel for superior grip Branding on the midfoot Outsole reinforced to the upper Sandal care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
